title: calyptrocalyx multifidus
intro: Calyptrocalyx multifidus is a species of flowering plant in the family Arecaceae, commonly known as the fan palm family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including its ability to be used as a natural anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. Calyptrocalyx multifidus has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves can be dried and used in teas, capsules, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
